text.message: Risk it risk it risk it!
if oj plows me, i blame you red
then trade oj the mats they need for plow
The world is not out to get you blue
It would just look so cool
Orange just decided to do that
oj was clearly setting up the plow
and then you traded them brick over me
ok what part of that sequence is incorrect
They could have been going anywhere
and yet they weren't going anywhere
I cant control what they do
you can control what you trade them
when i was offering the same trade
OH RES MIGHT OLOUGH ME LOL
The road race is gonna be CRAZY
It’s blue with three down devs…
dude i need army and 4 vps to win
You were just going to move it
dam red is about to win
No one can take army and they have 3 down devs?
dude i need 4 vps to win
and oj and you both have one
so im locked out of winning
yeahhh you dont think im winning
Not a good way to play
not really, i need devs to win
in fact, because of you, it is the only way i can win
so trading road mats to buy devs is the ONLY strategy i have
Sound like a good play by me
that you claim isnt a vp
How am I the rob lol
Glad blue gave it to you
red ur two roads away from winning and just crying a river
And you’re blocking me makes no sense
you are two roads away, oj is at least a city away
